reviews.comment:
Preguntamos si vendían agua caliente y la empleada de mala manera contesto ; afuera están las máquinas sale 30 y es con monedas . Pregunto afuera si me cambian monedas y respondieron ; No manejamos monedas ! Creo que así no se debe tratar a un usuario . Si tienen esa máquina de agua caliente que funciona con monedas deberian cambiar monedas

(Translated by Google)
We asked if they sold hot water, and the employee rudely replied, "The machines are outside; it costs 30 and it's coin-operated." I asked outside if they would give me change, and they responded, "We don't handle coins!" I don't think a customer should be treated like that. If they have that coin-operated hot water machine, they should be able to give me change.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtMGVIQjBRRRAB
